label: CALIBRATION DIAGNOSTIC: comparison with captured final next-token distributions; not a Jacobian Lens quality or reproduction gate

next_token_noninferiority_diagnostic.interpretation: Teacher-forced next-token calibration only; failure does not imply failure on the Jacobian Lens intermediate-concept objective.

predictive_improvement_diagnostic.interpretation: Next-token distribution calibration only. Jacobian Lens is fit to future-summed causal transport, so this is not a lens-quality gate.

native_comparison.interpretation: positive values favor the native lens over the primary lens
